/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/moq5-fmp4-publish.dir/main.c.o" -o moq5-fmp4-publish  /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-service.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-msf.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-media-object.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-loc.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-cmaf.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-adapter-pico-wt-managed.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-adapter-pico-wt.a _deps/picoquic/libpicohttp-core.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-adapter-picoquic.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/moq5/install/lib/libmoq-core.a /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libcrypto.dylib _deps/picoquic/libpicoquic-core.a _deps/picoquic/libpicoquic-log.a _deps/picoquic/libpicoquic-core.a _deps/picoquic/libpicoquic-log.a /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/deps/picotls/build/libpicotls-core.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/deps/picotls/build/libpicotls-openssl.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/deps/picotls/build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a
